name: local-marketplace
description: Local plugin marketplace for personal Claude Code extensions

plugins.name: superunity
plugins.description: Comprehensive Unity 3D game development plugin for Claude Code: exploring, planning, TDD, debugging, code review, subagent orchestration, and verification workflows

plugins.name: superunity-design
plugins.description: Game design toolkit for a 2.5D puzzle platformer (Valiant Hearts style). 9 auto-triggered design skills (routing hub, brainstorming, mechanics, puzzles, narrative, level, camera, visual feedback, audio) plus 5 agents (design-scene, design-review, design-brief, polish-pass, mechanic-test).
